name: @valuz/desktop
description: Electron desktop shell for Valuz Agent
author: Valuz

scripts.dev: VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:1420 concurrently -k "vite --config vite.renderer.config.ts" "vite build --watch --config vite.main.config.ts" "vite build --watch --config vite.preload.config.ts" "wait-on tcp:1420 dist-electron/main.js dist-electron/preload.js && electron ."
scripts.build: pnpm typecheck && vite build --config vite.renderer.config.ts && vite build --config vite.main.config.ts && vite build --config vite.preload.config.ts && electron-builder --config build/electron-builder.yml --publish ${ELECTRON_PUBLISH:-never}
scripts.typecheck: tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.main.json && tsc --noEmit -p tsconfig.preload.json
